data.title: US stock futures rise following record advances, despite government shutdown. Nasdaq, S&P 500, Dow Jones all see gains. Fed likely to cut rates in October. Nvidia and AMD stocks perform well. Bond yields: 10-year at 4.09%, 2-year at 3.55%. Trump proposes issuing rebate checks.
data.description: US stock futures rose on Friday following record gains on Thursday, with major benchmark indices showing higher futures. Despite most S&P 500 sectors declining on Thursday, information technology and communication services saw advancements. President Trump suggested issuing rebate checks to Americans funded by tariff revenue, aiming to pay down the nation's debt. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.09% and the two-year bond was at 3.55%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool predicts a 97.8% chance of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates in October. Futures showed increases: Dow Jones (+0.24%), S&P 500 (+0.25%), Nasdaq 100 (+0.26%), Russell 2000 (+0.42%). The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose in premarket trading. Nvidia Corp. reached a market capitalization of $4.6 trillion, while Advanced Micro Devices surged 3.5% and Intel Corp. advanced 2.2%. The Dow Jones index closed 79 points higher at 46,519.72.

data.title: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) will hold its 3Q 2025 earnings conference call on October 31, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Leading energy company Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) is set to host its quarterly earnings conference call on Friday, October 31, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET (10:00 a.m. CT). Those interested can dial in to listen at 888-256-9157 using conference ID #5158291. The call will feature top executives including Mike Wirth, Chairman of the Board & CEO, and Eimear Bonner, Vice President & Chief Financial Officer.

data.title: Metacon signs EUR 7.1 million contract with Elektra for 7.5 MW hydrogen project in Romania.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Metacon announced its selection as a supplier for a hydrogen project involving a 7.5 MW electrolysis plant for Elektra Power SRL in Romania. The main contract for the project has been officially signed by both Metacon and Elektra following the communication made on September 18, 2025.

data.title: telMAX expands into Barrie, officially breaking ground as Canada's fastest fiber internet provider.
data.description: telMAX, a leading internet service provider in Canada, celebrated a significant milestone by hosting a groundbreaking event in Barrie on Oct. 3, 2025. The Company has been recognized as the Fastest Internet Service Provider in Canada by PCMag. This marks a crucial step in their expansion across Ontario. TelMAX's groundbreaking signifies their commitment to growth and innovation in providing high-speed internet services to customers. This event showcases their dedication to improving connectivity and expanding their reach.

data.title: Interlace unveiled 6M+ cards at Token2049 Singapore, revolutionizing stablecoin payments in the industry.
data.description: On October 1-2, 2025, Singapore hosted the Token2049 Summit, a prominent gathering for the crypto and fintech sectors. The summit drew over 20,000 industry experts alongside numerous companies and institutions. This event served as a hub for networking, knowledge exchange, and collaboration within the rapidly growing sectors of digital finance and blockchain technology.

data.title: Solana up 2% to $231, sees $77 million outflows. Pushing for $500 trillion tokenization dream to support financial infrastructure.
data.description: Solana (SOL) has seen a 2% increase to $231 this Friday morning despite experiencing $77 million in net outflows. The blockchain is envisioning hosting tokenized securities valued at trillions of dollars in the long run. In a recent post to its community, Solana highlighted that securities, such as Nasdaq-listed Class A common shares, are already being issued on-chain with complete shareholder rights. Trading of these tokenized instruments is anticipated to commence later this year as part of an effort to establish the network as a key component of the global financial infrastructure. Solana views tokenization as a major shift and aims to bolster activity within the securities market.

data.title: Accelerant (NYSE: ARX) to announce Q3 2025 results on Nov 13 before market opens, with a conference call at 8:00 AM ET.
data.description: Atlanta-based technology company Accelerant Holdings, listed on NYSE as ARX, will be reporting its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. The results will be released before the market opens on Thursday, November 13, 2025. A webcast and conference call to discuss the third quarter financial performance will be held at 8:00 A.M. Eastern Time. This platform operates a data-driven risk exchange for the specialty insurance market.

data.title: WNS (Holdings) Limited reveals AGM details for shareholders in New York, London, Mumbai. #AGM
data.description: WNS (Holdings) Limited has disclosed information regarding its annual general meeting ("AGM") for shareholders in New York, London, and Mumbai, India. The company will be presenting key details and reports at the AGM, including financial statements and performance metrics for the period. Shareholders are encouraged to attend the meeting to participate in decision-making processes and discussions on the future direction of the company. This event will provide a platform for shareholders to engage with the company's management and raise any queries or concerns they may have. It is essential for shareholders to take note of the AGM details and make arrangements to attend, as their participation and input are valuable for the company's governance.

data.title: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Roseville, California within Placer One master plan. Small-town charm, close to Sacramento.
data.description: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has revealed the opening of Canterbury and Cambridge, in Placer One, Roseville, California. This announcement marks the addition of two new communities to the sought-after master plan. Positioned near Sacramento and the Sierra Nevada foothills, Roseville is renowned for its quaint appeal, family-centric activities, premium retail and dining options, as well as diverse outdoor pursuits. The new communities promise to offer prospective homeowners a chance to settle into a vibrant and convenient location.

data.title: KB Home opens Greenleaf Grove in Bothell, WA, offering new homes in a vibrant community. #KBHome #Bothell #GreenleafGrove
data.description: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has revealed the launch of Greenleaf Grove in Bothell, Washington, a serene cul-de-sac community. Bothell is known for its small-town charm, lively downtown area, and various local attractions. The community offers contemporary homes tailored to modern living preferences. Greenleaf Grove is part of KB Home's significant presence as one of the leading homebuilders in the U.S. This latest project aims to meet the demand for housing in Bothell, offering a blend of tranquility and accessibility to local amenities.

data.title: Dollar Tree buys 1.25M sq. ft. distribution center in Litchfield Park, AZ. Anticipated to open in spring 2026.
data.description: A new 1.25 million square foot distribution center in Litchfield Park, AZ, near Phoenix has been acquired by Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR). The company is set to be the inaugural operator of this facility, with expectations for it to become operational by spring of 2026. This move aims to enhance Dollar Tree's supply chain in the Southwest, facilitating quicker and more efficient service to its stores. This strategic development reinforces the company's commitment to delivering the value its customers rely on.

data.title: CAVA opens its first Miami location at 801 Brickell Ave, 2,700 sq ft with dining room and patio seating.
data.description: CAVA, a leading Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant chain listed on the NYSE under the symbol CAVA, has recently inaugurated its inaugural Miami outlet in Brickell situated at 801 Brickell Avenue Suite 140, Miami, FL 33131. Spanning an area of 2,700 square feet, CAVA Brickell boasts a dining area, patio seating, and facilitates digital order pick-up and delivery services. Prior to this, CAVA launched its initial two South Florida branches in Hialeah and Plantation earlier in the year. The outlet aims to offer its renowned Mediterranean hospitality and inviting ambiance to customers.
